# CWE-312 — Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-312-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

type patientRecord struct {
	ID  string `json:"id"`
	SSN string `json:"ssn"`
}

// Vulnerable: persists government id in plaintext JSON on disk.
func StorePatient(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	rec := patientRecord{ID: r.FormValue("id"), SSN: r.FormValue("ssn")}
	data, _ := json.Marshal(rec)
	_ = os.WriteFile("/data/patients/"+rec.ID+".json", data, 0600)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
